Tankless Water Heater Installation

Tankless Water Heater Installation | Arlington Heights, IL

When you're ready to upgrade to a tankless water heater, call Plumbers 911 at 1-833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911) to schedule your service.

Steamy, hot showers are the perfect way to thaw out on frigid Arlington Heights winter days or clean up after exploring the village's bike trails and parks in the summer. Like the furnishings in the Muller House at the Arlington Heights Historical Museum, an old water heater can seem like a relic of the past if it can't keep up with hot showers. 

Plumbers 911 can help you find local plumbers who have experience with tankless water heater installations. Whether your water heater keeps breaking down or can't handle your hot water demands, a new tankless water heater can help.

Call Plumbers 911 at 1-833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911) to get help upgrading to a tankless water heater.

Why You Might Need Tankless Water Heater Installation

It's common to have conventional water heaters with large tanks. While they're effective, they're not always energy efficient and can pose a flood risk. Older conventional water heaters can also struggle to supply enough hot water for your demands. Once the tank's hot water is gone, the unit can take several hours to heat more water. 

Installing a tankless water heater offers on-demand hot water instead of heating gallons of water and keeping it hot. It cuts down on energy since the unit only has to heat water when you need it. Tankless water heaters are smaller, which comes in handy if space is tight. 

However, converting to a tankless water heater can require additional work. Their internal components are complex, and you may have to redo your existing plumbing pipes to connect properly to the new tankless water heater. You might also need to upgrade the gas line since tankless water heaters operate with higher BTUs. 

Tankless Water Heater Installation Services in Arlington Heights

If you decide on a new tankless unit, you need a licensed plumber because of the installation complexity. Our plumbers can install tankless water heaters properly to ensure they meet code requirements. They also use the latest technology and tools to install the water heater safely.

Most plumbers try to replace your water heater first. At Plumbers 911, our plumbers can diagnose the problem and let you know if repairs can be done as a cost-effective solution or if it's better to replace it due to the age and condition.

Our plumbers can help you with the entire process, starting with choosing a location for the new water heater. They'll help you select the right water heater size to handle your family's hot water use. The plumber will replace existing pipes if necessary to connect your new tankless water heater properly. They'll also safely connect it to the power source, either electricity or gas, and check all the connections to ensure it's working properly. If you need a larger gas line, the plumber can also install that for you.

Hire a Arlington Heights Plumber Today

Plumbing is an important part of your home and is a complicated system that's best left to professionals. At Plumbers 911, we take the worry out of choosing a plumber to install your tankless new water heater by thoroughly screening all of our plumbers. Our referral network includes local plumbers who have extensive experience, proper licensing and insurance, so you can work with reliable, highly skilled professionals.

When you're ready for tankless water heater installation in Arlington Heights, call Plumbers 911 at 1-833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911) to find a reliable local plumber.
